narrative:
Perry 19 (precinct in Stark County) has 571 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.5 percentage points.
